reasoning: Emotional (60%): The Echo Box reads immediately as a friendly toy-like summon — green lid/hat, cream body, a readable face, round boxy silhouette. Mood is charming and non-threatening, fitting Hyrule toy-diorama energy. However, the brown/orange leg region is dull and the overall palette sits slightly under the bright saturated warmth expected; greens are solid but whites and browns lack the punchy saturation seen in Denzi peer summons. Emotional score ~7/10. Technical (40%): 1px hard outlines are clean and consistent across the sprite; pixel-grid snapping is tight with no sub-pixel bleed; shading uses 2-3 hard tones on the green cap and 2 on the body — within spec, though the torso shading is minimal and flattens the form slightly. Hand-pixeled quality reads authentic. Technical score ~8/10. Weighted total: 7×0.6 + 8×0.4 = 7.4 → 7. Passes technical bar, marginal on emotional vibrancy. A saturation pass on the lower body and a touch more highlight/shadow contrast on the torso would push this to a clean pass.
